lines.speaker: Dwarf gang member
lines.text: I'm nobody you need to worry about...who are you? Why are you asking so many questions? Are you with the Varrock guards?

lines.speaker: Dwarf gang member
lines.text: Well, as if it's any of your business, I'm an associate of Hammerspike. He's a great dwarf you know. You could learn a lot from a dwarf like him.

lines.speaker: Dwarf gang member
lines.text: I have an ongoing contract with Hammerspike, when he gives the word, the hammer starts flying.
